visual_description: Two men sit across from each other at a table in a dimly lit, cluttered room; one wears a patterned shirt and holds a pen, the other wears a dark jacket. The man in the patterned shirt gestures with his pen while leaning forward, and the other man leans in slightly, looking at him. Behind them, other figures are partially visible, moving in the background near a wall with writing.
